title: Grok 5 — The Biggest AI News Is Here (Musk’s AGI Bet)
summary: YouTube video analyzing rumors and confirmed facts about Grok 5, xAI's next-generation model. Discusses Colossus 2 hardware (1-gigawatt cluster, 500,000 GPUs), missed Q1 launch, and Musk's claim that Grok 5 is indistinguishable from AGI. Compares positioning against Claude, GPT-5, and Gemini.
